pr.title: Non-Record: DG Attention, Differential-Gated Attention with Depth-Scheduled Novelty Encoding: (val_bpb=1.1898)

output.summary: DG Attention uses gradient-based novelty payloads in deep layers plus Flash-optimized designator matching, with a depth-scheduled gate replacing raw values.
techniques: Novelty-conditioned value stream with causal baseline differences
Asymmetric designator matching via Flash Attention
Depth-scheduled β gating instead of learned collapse
